memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: color = col（颜色词根）+ or → 有颜色的
color-blind-ness = 颜色+盲+状态 → 色盲症

coreMeaning.en: seemingly valid; capable of being colored

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: color+able = 能着色的，引申为貌似有理的

coreMeaning.cn: 科罗拉多（美国州名，意为红色）

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: colorado = 西班牙语「有颜色的（红）」→ 红色大地

coreMeaning.en: a substance used to color something

coreMeaning.en: the arrangement of colors; the process of coloring

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: color+ation = 着色的过程或结果 → 色彩分布

coreMeaning.en: elaborate ornamentation in vocal music; a soprano singer

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: color+cast = 彩色+播出 → 彩色电视播映

coreMeaning.en: relating to the colon and rectum

coreMeaning.cn: 色彩丰富的；生动有趣的
coreMeaning.en: full of color; vivid and interesting

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: color+ific = 产生颜色的 → 着色力

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: color+space = 颜色的空间范围 → 色域
coloss(巨像)+al → 像巨像一样的 → 庞大的

coreMeaning.cn: 初乳（分娩后最初分泌的乳汁）
coreMeaning.en: the first milk produced after giving birth

coreMeaning.cn: 色盲的；（引申）不分种族的
coreMeaning.en: unable to distinguish colors; not discriminating by race

colour+fast = 颜色+牢固 → 颜色不褪色

colourless = colorless 的英式拼写 → 无色

colouring = coloring 英式拼写
